name: Curried Cream of Cauliflower & Apple Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Golden Delicious apple, peeled, split, cored and sliced
4 cups Cauliflower (about 1 medium head), greens and stem discarded, head broken into small florets
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm the chicken stock over medium heat.
2. Melt the butter in a cast-iron pot over medium-low heat.
3. Add the onions, curry powder, and saffron; sweat for 2 minutes, stirring often.
4. Add the sliced apple; sweat for another 5 minutes, stirring often.
5. Add the cauliflower and chicken stock; bring to a boil.
6. Boil until the cauliflower is tender when pierced with a knife (about 20 minutes).
7. Stir in the cream and cook for an additional 3 minutes. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Transfer the soup in batches to a blender or food processor; puree at high speed until very smooth.
9. Keep warm until ready to serve, or refrigerate when cool and reheat just before serving.
